criteria.name: core_gameplay
checks: turn order alternates between the three player and enemy units
player drag/release fires exactly one projectile on player turns
enemy auto-fires on enemy turns
projectiles use visible ballistic arcs
hits advance the damage state and can end the match

criteria.name: visual_fidelity
checks: uses extracted Castle Clashers assets
keeps player castle left and enemy castle right
renders a clean portrait phone composition
top bar contains player health, timer, and enemy health

criteria.name: feedback
checks: trajectory preview is visible while dragging
hits produce shake, impact particles, and floating damage
castle destruction has three visible states

criteria.name: playable_ad_compliance
checks: single-file playable output exists
CTA is shown on victory and defeat
CTA uses mraid.open or window.open without iframe navigation
no external runtime libraries

criteria.name: layout_and_runtime
checks: 9:16 canvas is scaled to fit without scrollbars
no visual overflow outside the phone frame
benchmark hooks expose deterministic state
single-file size remains below 5 MB
